# Refocus

> Refocus is a free desktop screen break reminder built to protect eyes, posture, and focus without breaking flow.

## Canonical URL

- https://re-focus.me

## Summary

Refocus is a local-first Windows desktop app for scheduled screen breaks. It ships real named presets, including 20-20-20, working hours, local-only history, Smart Pause timing based on local activity, and adjustable break overlays ranging from gentle popups to stricter full-screen breaks.

## Product facts

- Free desktop app
- Windows screen break reminder
- Local-only settings and history
- Includes a 20-20-20 preset for short visual resets
- Smart Pause uses idle-aware timing and typing-aware deferral in the current build
- Break presets include 20-20-20, Pomodoro Soft, Deep Work, and Marathon
- Break modes include modal and full-screen overlays with optional strict protections
- Daily stats include focused time, adherence, taken versus skipped breaks, and weekly trend summaries

## Important links

- Website: https://re-focus.me
- Download: https://github.com/feymore69/refocus/releases/download/v0.2.5/Refocus_0.2.5_x64-setup.exe
- Desktop app repository: https://github.com/feymore69/refocus
- Website repository: https://github.com/feymore69/refocus-website
